en: Winter is back... 3 days of rain and storms. While Türkiye was waiting for spring, it was affected by a wave of rainy and cold weather. According to meteorology, partly and very cloudy weather will prevail throughout the country for 3 days from today, and there will be intermittent showers and storms in many regions. Even high places…
la: Hiems est... III dies pluviae et procellae. Dum Türkiye ver exspectabat, fluctu pluviae et frigoris afficiebatur. Secundum meteorologiam partim et tempestates nubilosae per 3 dies ab hodierno in tota regione praevalebunt, et imbres et tempestates in multis regionibus intermittentur. Etiam aras…
